Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar May-21-2026 Continued To Jun-29-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER CARL NATVIG'S MOTION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Transferred to be heard in Department 501 on June 29, 2026. This is a real property matter per SF Local Rule 8.10A1. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
